description: This file defines the TwilioSmsProvider class, which implements the SmsProvider interface to send SMS messages using Twilio's REST API. It handles configuration, request construction, and error handling for sending SMS through Twilio.

classes.name: TwilioSmsProvider
classes.description: Implementation of SmsProvider that uses Twilio's REST API to send SMS messages.

methods.name: TwilioSmsProvider
methods.description: Constructor that initializes the provider with notification properties and sets up the HTTP client.

methods.name: send
methods.description: Sends an SMS message via Twilio API to the specified phone number using the provided notification request and message content.

methods.name: url
methods.description: Utility method to URL-encode a string for inclusion in HTTP form data.
